notes.text: HONORED LEGACY PRICING. Original quote June 19, 2025 (door-knocked by Darcy) was $14,355 HST-incl Gold. Customer revisiting May 2026, tight on money. Honored at $14,855 (+$500 to partially absorb 11-month material+labor cost movement). Real cash net ~$1,265 (10.1%) after 35% S+M+O — below 12% Gold floor. Target: negotiate $500 off Ryan separately to recover floor (~14.1% net).
notes.author: system

notes.text: EAGLEVIEW REPORT 65990322 (dated 6/20/2025). Total roof 1,845sf / 13 facets / predominant 6/12. Two structures: (1) Main house 1,444sf / 10 facets — 6/12 (1187.9sf), 8/12 (123.8sf), 10/12 (30.2sf), 11/12 (103.6sf). (2) Detached shed 398sf / 3 facets / 7/12 — EXCLUDED. Lengths: ridges 86, hips 40, valleys 61, rakes 138, eaves 134.
notes.author: system

notes.text: PROFITABILITY MATH. At honored $14,855 HST-incl: pre-HST $12,917, hard cost $8,284 (Ryan+materials+disposal+mob+supervisor at 7/12 blend), gross $4,633 (35.9%), real cash net $1,265 after 35% S+M+O ($4,521). 12% Gold floor would require $14,002 gross-profit-side OR $1,498 real net — currently $233 short. Recovery path: Ryan -$500 negotiation.
notes.author: system

notes.text: PRICE-TO-SELL DROP. Customer revisited May 7 saying she has cheaper competing quotes and is price-conscious. Mac dropped from $14,855 to $14,355 HST-incl (original June 2025 Darcy door-knock number, no inflation pass-through). Old price struck through on proposal page. Platinum + Diamond removed — Gold-only proposal. NEW WORKFLOW: triggers PRICE-TO-SELL tag on Ryan work order. Ryan must pre-approve at tightened sub margin before quote goes firm. If Ryan declines, Mac sources alternate or self-performs. If pattern repeats, replace long-term. Math at $14,355 HST-incl: pre-HST $12,482.61, HST $1,872.39. Real cash net before Ryan negotiation ~$830 (6.6%, below 12% floor). With Ryan -$500 = ~$1,498 (12%, at floor). Floor is $14,355 — do not go below.
notes.author: system
